topics.title: Dinner Party Etiquette Dispute
topics.summary: The studio debates whether a guest was rude for leaving early and another guest was rude for arriving late to a dinner party.

topics.title: Dinner Party Etiquette and Late Arrivals
topics.summary: The studio explores a heated debate over social etiquette regarding late arrivals, early departures from dinner parties, and the impact of such actions on hosts.

topics.title: Spider-Man 3 Film Review
topics.summary: The studio discusses the production, special effects, and narrative structure of Spider-Man 3, praising Tobey Maguire's performance and Sam Raimi's direction.

topics.title: Spider-Man Film Review and Guest Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses the quality of a Spider-Man film, featuring praise for the acting and effects while debating its length before transitioning to segments on local events and guest appearances.

topics.title: Neighborhood Dynamics and Social Etiquette
topics.summary: The studio explores topics ranging from real estate concerns regarding changing demographics in the neighborhood to discussions on social etiquette at parties and various news items.

topics.title: Radio Ratings and Market Shifts
topics.summary: The studio reviews recent radio ratings across various markets, discussing the impact of Howard Stern's departure on local stations and the challenges of maintaining dominant listenership in the era of digital media.

topics.title: Bigfoot's Claims of Discrimination
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with a man known as Bigfoot who claims he is being discriminated against by landlords in Vermont due to his appearance.

topics.title: Family Relations and Medical Concerns
topics.summary: The show features a conversation regarding a caller's strained relationship with his mother, his medical issues involving rectal bleeding, and a brief interaction with an angry former landlord.

topics.title: Interview with Bigfoot and Jim Carroll
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with a man named Bigfoot regarding his lifestyle and habits, followed by a segment featuring magician Jim "The Psychic" Madman Carroll.

topics.title: Magic Tricks and Lie Detector Tests
topics.summary: The studio features a magic trick involving a card hidden in a woman's clothing followed by several guests participating in a lie detector test to answer personal questions.

topics.title: Memory Skills and Online Chess
topics.summary: The studio features Jim the Psychic Madman, who demonstrates his memory for zip codes and dates, followed by an interview with Marty Grund regarding his role in the Internet Chess Club.

topics.title: Online Chess and Music Segments
topics.summary: The studio discusses the features of a popular online chess website, the dynamics of personal relationships during public announcements, and various music tracks including several explicit rap songs.

topics.title: Celebrity Wealth and Scandalous News
topics.summary: The show features a series of musical parodies, a wealth comparison quiz between celebrities like Mariah Carey and Donald Trump, and reports on a reporter's scandalous emails and a pilot's deceptive sexual scam.

topics.title: Legal Defense and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of topics including legal claims regarding consensual sex, Rosie O'Donnell's potential new television projects, listener feedback on host behavior, guest appearances on Entourage, and the release of John Lennon cover songs for charity.

topics.title: Entertainment News and Current Events
topics.summary: The show covers various topics including Michael Jackson's music, upcoming immigration rallies, the health of White House spokesperson Tony Snow, celebrity news regarding Boy George and Angelina Jolie, and upcoming comedy performances.
